exact_next_step: User/provider confirms whether Meiji E1 RA/TA and Sailu E1 ST are truly matched. Only after that confirmation should DARLIN-01 sample-sheet construction and official preprocessing dry-run begin for one selected route.

hypotheses.component_summary: Brain 031319A-E1 Meiji RA/TA barcode-DARLIN plus Brain 031319A-E1 Sailu ST
hypotheses.rationale: Same tissue and same chip_position make this the most credible first matching route from the manual table.
hypotheses.risk: Cross-company matching is unconfirmed; no explicit provider sample sheet or cell/spot-level bridge was found locally.

hypotheses.component_summary: Brain 031319A-B1 Sailu CA/TA/RA in shared PE100/250 folder
hypotheses.rationale: Same company, same folder, same chip_position, and explicit index mapping give a coherent barcode-only route.
hypotheses.risk: No confirmed ST/expression counterpart was found for B1, so this is not yet a barcode-informed NicheFate route.

hypotheses.component_summary: Brain B1 Sailu CA/TA/RA forced to Brain E1 Sailu ST
hypotheses.rationale: This only preserves same-company provenance and ignores the stronger chip_position field.
hypotheses.risk: Different chip_position means the route should not be treated as matched without explicit provider confirmation.

hypotheses.component_summary: Pancreas 031319A-E2 Sailu ST in shared PE100/100 folder
hypotheses.rationale: Different tissue and chip_position from the Brain-first routes make this unsuitable for the first development route.
hypotheses.risk: Shared Sailu folder with Brain E1 ST suggests batch-level co-sequencing or mixed delivery, not biological matching.
